default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss 409a valuation for GrowthX Labs, an AI-enabled content marketing agency seeking VC funding to develop a SaaS platform.](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs provides AI-powered content marketing services, primarily SEO, to B2B tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Currently operating as an agency, with plans to develop a SaaS platform to scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Raised VC funding on promise of transitioning from services to SaaS model](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Minimum engagement is $10k/month for 12 weeks, then aiming for 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

## Topics

### Business Model & Services

  - [Started as AI-enabled content generation for DeepGram (Marcel's previous company)](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Evolved into consulting/agency model due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Current focus: 12-week pilot programs for clients, ramping up content production](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Use AI throughout process, with human oversight at all stages](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Developed internal framework to reduce reliance on expensive third-party tools (e.g. AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Client Base & Target Market

  - [Primarily B2B tech companies, ranging from seed to Series A and beyond](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Notable clients include Reddit, Ramp, Prophecy.io](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [Majority are Series A companies looking to quickly deploy raised capital](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [1-2 month sales cycle, starting with 2-month pilot, aiming for 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Team & Operations

  - [Marcel Santilli: Content strategist, former CMO at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Daniel Lopes: Developing internal tools and frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Hiring for 10 roles to create client service "pods"](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Moving away from freelancers to in-house talent for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Financial Projections & Funding

  - [Two scenarios: agency-only growth vs. successful SaaS transition](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [SaaS model projects triple-triple-double-double-double growth](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Raised VC funding to develop SaaS platform while running agency services](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Current ownership: 100% Marcel, with 30% options planned for Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Challenges & Risks

  - [Scalability issues with current tools (e.g. Airtable costs)](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Potential disruption from changes in search algorithms or AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Managing multiple clients and expanding service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Transitioning from services to SaaS model (unique approach in the industry)](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Send signed engagement letter for 409a valuation](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - Provide additional documentation:
      - [Bios for key team members](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [List of comparable funded companies in the space](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - Detailed breakdown of current and planned service offerings
  - [Clarify financial data separation between LLC and C Corp](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Finalize option agreement for Daniel before closing VC round](https://fathom.video/share/XpN6yR8sKxBzypiFRxynxXY76saEEmW8?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
